name: BarChart
goal: Animated horizontal bar chart with hover affordance + tooltip, optional gridlines, and an opt-in inline sparkline mode — sub-4KB, no JS deps.
description: Horizontal bar chart accepting a JSON-attribute or property-bound array of { label, value, meta?, color? } rows. Auto-scales when max is unset, renders ARIA progressbars per row, and routes color through the shared resolveColor() helper so per-row color accepts both named tokens ("blue", "green", …) and arbitrary CSS values ("#5a8", "var(--brand)"). Each row is keyboard-focusable and emits ce-chart-hover / ce-chart-leave / ce-chart-select with a shared family payload. CSS-only tooltip pinned to each row reveals the formatted value (and meta, when present) on hover or focus. Optional `gridlines` overlays 4 evenly-spaced ticks (0/25/50/75/100% of max) plus a labeled axis strip. Optional `sparkline` mode collapses the chart into an inline mini-strip (no labels, no axis). Width transitions honour prefers-reduced-motion and the `animated` prop.
limitations: Single-series only. For multi-series trends or line/area charts, use ce-plot (planned in phases 7–9). Tooltip is positioned above the bar and may clip in tight overflow:hidden parents — render the chart in a container with adequate top padding when needed.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of { label, value, meta?, color? }. color is a named token or arbitrary CSS color.

props.name: max
props.description: Forces chart maximum; 0 means auto-scale to the largest row value.

props.name: color
props.description: Default bar color when a row has no color override. Named token or arbitrary CSS color.

props.name: labelWidth
props.description: CSS width for the left label column. "auto" sizes to content.

props.name: animated
props.description: Animate width transitions when data changes. Property is `animated` (not `animate`) to avoid colliding with HTMLElement.animate(); attribute is also `animated`. prefers-reduced-motion always disables motion regardless of this flag.

props.name: showValues
props.description: Render the inline numeric value inside each bar fill.

props.name: gridlines
props.description: Overlay 4 evenly-spaced vertical gridlines on every track and render a labeled axis strip below the chart at 0/25/50/75/100% of the resolved max.

props.name: sparkline
props.description: Inline-flow mini strip mode: strips labels, axis, meta, and tooltip. Width controlled by --ce-bar-spark-width (default 120px).

props.name: format
props.description: Number formatter for the inline value, tooltip, and gridline tick labels; defaults to the shared locale-aware number() helper.

events.name: ce-chart-hover
events.description: Fires when a row is hovered or focused. Shared family event — same name as ce-plot — so consumers can listen on a parent.

events.name: ce-chart-leave
events.description: Fires when the pointer leaves a row or focus blurs.

events.name: ce-chart-select
events.detail: { row: BarRow, index: number, originalEvent: Event }
events.description: Fires on row click or Enter/Space keypress while focused.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-label-width
cssVariables.description: Width of the left label column; set inline from labelWidth.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-track-h
cssVariables.description: Bar track height; switches to 12px when compact, 10px when sparkline.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-radius
cssVariables.description: Corner radius for track and fill.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-fade
cssVariables.description: Width / hover / tooltip transition; replaced with 0s under prefers-reduced-motion.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-hover-tint
cssVariables.description: Track background tint applied on row hover or focus.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-tooltip-bg
cssVariables.description: Background of the per-row value tooltip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-tooltip-fg
cssVariables.description: Foreground (text) color of the per-row value tooltip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-tooltip-border
cssVariables.description: Border color of the per-row value tooltip.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-grid
cssVariables.description: Vertical gridline color when `gridlines` is enabled.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-grid-fg
cssVariables.description: Tick-label color in the axis strip when `gridlines` is enabled.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-spark-width
cssVariables.description: Total width of the sparkline strip when `sparkline` is enabled.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Tooltip inner vertical padding + grid strip top margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Row vertical margin + bar inner padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Row inner gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Empty-state vertical padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Label, meta, empty-state, and gridline-label text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Label and empty-state font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Inline value, meta, tooltip, and tick-label font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Bar inline value text color and tooltip foreground default.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface
cssVariables.description: Tooltip background default.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface-2
cssVariables.description: Track background.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Tooltip border default.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Default fill (resolved via shared color helper) and focus-ring color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-shadow
cssVariables.description: Tooltip box-shadow default.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Default transition timing function used for width, background, and tooltip fades.

globalDependencies.purpose: Locale-aware default number formatter (via shared internal/charts/format.ts).
Detect prefers-reduced-motion to gate width and tooltip transitions (via shared internal/charts/easing.ts).

a11y.notes: Each row is focusable (tabindex=0) with a visible focus ring; the track exposes role=progressbar with aria-valuemin/max/now and an aria-label of the row label. Hover, focus, click, and Enter/Space all dispatch the shared ce-chart-* family events. The CSS tooltip uses role=tooltip and is hidden via opacity (so screen readers still see the underlying aria-label). prefers-reduced-motion disables every transition.
